name: Write

file_path.description: The absolute path to the file to write.

content.description: The content to write to the file.

description: Write content to a file. Will overwrite existing file if it exists. Parent directories will be created if needed.
description_zh: 向文件写入内容。如果文件已存在会覆盖。如果需要，将创建父目录。

default_params.content:
Hello World
This is a test file.

examples: Write simple file: file_path="/path/to/file.txt", content="Hello World"
Write code file: file_path="/path/to/main.py", content="def main():\n    pass"
examples_zh: 写入简单文件: file_path="/path/to/file.txt", content="Hello World"
写入代码文件: file_path="/path/to/main.py", content="def main():\n    pass"
